data.content: Implementation complete on branch `knot/foolery-f02d` at commit `a1cbe5c33d64783f86cd63b4c001952afb1fd539` and pushed to `origin/knot/foolery-f02d`. Added one persisted `defaults.interactiveSessionTimeoutMinutes` setting with a 10 minute default, exposed it in Settings > Defaults, moved interactive watchdog policy out of per-agent capability presets into shared runtime configuration, and updated setup/settings/runtime tests to cover defaults, persistence, and the shared timeout behavior. Validation passed: `bun run lint`, `bunx tsc --noEmit`, `bun run test`, and `bun run build`.
